source_contract.blockers: actual fixed-H blockerIndex in the original boundary frame
source_contract.frontier_roles: actual frontier q and w indices; not sorted or quotiented
source_contract.g0_family: independent cover row for hub and g0_spoke
source_contract.g1_family: independent cover row for hub and g1_spoke
source_contract.m_family: CanonicalAllOneSemanticRowTable.main; at fixed-H blocker-image centers it is synchronized to the actual fixed-H selected support
source_contract.ranks: ordinal ranks of all 78 distances in original boundary order
